Episodes.Title: The Great War and Modern Memory
Episodes.Actors: Mahershala Ali, Carmen Ejogo, Stephen Dorff
Episodes.Plot: The disappearance of a young brother and sister leads to a frantic search which will haunt one detective for the rest of his life.

Episodes.Title: Kiss Tomorrow Goodbye
Episodes.Actors: Mahershala Ali, Carmen Ejogo, Stephen Dorff
Episodes.Plot: As the search for Julie continues, the doll discovered at the crime scene provokes a reaction, while Wayne and Roland learn of a potential suspect.

Episodes.Title: The Big Never
Episodes.Actors: Mahershala Ali, Carmen Ejogo, Stephen Dorff
Episodes.Plot: The search for Julie brings Wayne and Amelia together again, Wayne and Roland retrace their investigation to spot missed clues, while one White Finger resident receives a warning.

Episodes.Title: The Hour and the Day
Episodes.Actors: Mahershala Ali, Carmen Ejogo, Stephen Dorff
Episodes.Plot: Wayne and Roland investigate possible connections between the local church and the Purcell crimes as tensions in West Finger reach boiling point.

Episodes.Title: If You Have Ghosts
Episodes.Actors: Mahershala Ali, Carmen Ejogo, Stephen Dorff
Episodes.Plot: In 1980, all hell breaks loose at the home of Woodard, while in the present, Wayne and Roland reconnect after Wayne makes a discovery.

Episodes.Title: Hunters in the Dark
Episodes.Actors: Mahershala Ali, Carmen Ejogo, Stephen Dorff
Episodes.Plot: In 1990, Wayne and Roland revisit the Purcell case to uncover previously hidden or forgotten clues, while Tom looks for answers and two faces from the past resurface.

Episodes.Title: The Final Country
Episodes.Actors: Mahershala Ali, Carmen Ejogo, Stephen Dorff
Episodes.Plot: In 1990, following an apparent suicide, the Purcell case is deemed solved, but Wayne and Roland have other ideas, which leads them to a defining course of action.

Episodes.Title: Now Am Found
Episodes.Actors: Mahershala Ali, Carmen Ejogo, Stephen Dorff
Episodes.Plot: Wayne struggles to hold on to his memories, and his grip on reality, as the truth behind the Purcell case is finally revealed.
